commands.narrative:
## Roster Changes Since Yesterday

Yesterday's `active_strategies_snapshot` was empty (first day this field is being captured), so no automated diff can be computed. Based on journal records confirmed in today's strategies.json, the full v17 BE-recalibration cohort (be5/be7/be9, n≈108 each) and the full v18 Markov DPM cohort (strict/exitonly/aggressive) were killed between 2026-05-11 and 2026-05-12. All six are absent from today's strategies.json. No new strategies were added since 2026-05-12 when the v23 cohort (vwap-climbing, vel2050-climbing, repeat-recovery, snipers5-recovery, snipers-max-vel) went live.

## Headline

**v21-bottom-excluded (shadow) is 13 trades from the n=100 promotion gate with all four SOL bar gates positive.** Simultaneously, v21-early-exit-meanrev shadow has crossed n=100 as INVALID (total=-0.331 SOL, drop_top3=-1.484 SOL) and is recommended for kill.

## Today's Activity

Very thin day: only 2 graduations detected as of report time vs. a 7-day median of 225 (graduation_rate_drop anomaly flagged). The diagnoser is HEALTHY — WS connected, last T+30 callback 47s ago, last graduation 77s ago — so this is a quiet PumpFun session, not a pipeline fault. Zero trades have closed today across all strategies. All P&L figures below are lifetime totals from leave-one-out-pnl.json.

## SOL Accumulation Picture

Three strategies are building genuine SOL with robust drop_top3 (edge survives removing the top 3 lottery trades):

1. **v9shadow-velmono-dev** — n=25, +4.18 SOL total, drop_top3=+2.56 SOL. Highest absolute P&L but only n=25 — too early to promote, but edge is clearly real.
2. **v9shadow-vel20-top5** — n=44, +3.89 SOL, drop_top3=+0.84 SOL. Strong accumulation across all return windows; edge-decay STABLE.
3. **v21-bottom-excluded (shadow)** — n=87, +3.72 SOL, drop_top3=+1.71 SOL, monthly=+59 SOL/mo. Closest to the promotion gate. Panel 11 shows the underlying filter cluster (vel<20+top5<10%) as STABLE (wr_std_dev=8.2%). At the current trade pace this strategy should hit n=100 within 1–3 days.

The vel 20-50 cohort (v10-best-double n=58 +2.88 SOL / v20-vel2050-dd-base n=12 +1.73 SOL) is accumulating steadily. Panel 11 vel 20-50 + dd>-10% is STABLE (wr_std_dev=7.8%).

## Bleeding Strategies

The vel5-10 family continues to bleed SOL despite the single-filter walk-forward being ROBUST (degradation 0.34pp):
- **v9shadow-vel5-10** — n=77, -0.884 SOL, drop_top3=-1.468. At this pace it hits n=100 squarely INVALID.
- **v14-vel5-10-dd-shadow** — n=51, -1.557 SOL, drop_top3=-1.936. Even more negative with dd protection. Adding dd>-10% did not rescue vel5-10's structural loss tail.
- **v15-vel5-10-dd-shadow** — n=37, -0.345 SOL, drop_top3=-0.855. Same pattern at lower n.

Structural conclusion forming: vel5-10 at TP=10/SL=30 has a positive walk-forward on the RESEARCH gate (+5..+100), but the live execution cost structure (gap penalties + jito) eats the narrow per-trade return. This band needs either a much wider TP or a dedicated low-cost execution path to be viable.

**v21-early-exit-meanrev (shadow) — n=141, -0.331 SOL total, drop_top3=-1.484 SOL — has crossed the n≥100 INVALID gate.** All four promotion bar conditions fail (total negative, drop_top3 deeply negative, monthly=-5.26 SOL). The paper variant also shows n=15, -1.415 SOL. Recommend killing both variants. The mean-reversion thesis (harvest +3.9% T+65 peak on the unfiltered population) is refuted: at TP=10/SL=15/90s the tokens that almost never reach TP in 90s dominate, producing near-certain SL exits.

## Cross-Day Patterns

- **v17/v18 experiment complete and closed.** The calm-survivor entry (sum_abs<60, dd>-10%) cannot accumulate SOL at TP=10/SL=25 regardless of exit overlay (BE triggers, Markov early-exit, trailing SL). This is a conclusive negative result on the calm-survivor entry signal at small TP.
- **v21-bottom-excluded is the strongest active candidate.** Broad exclusion-only filter (top5<=30%, dd>-25%, vel<200, age>=60s) with n=87 shadow trades showing genuine outlier-robust accumulation. This is NOT a lottery result: drop_top3=+1.714 SOL means the edge survives removing its three biggest winners.
- **v5-velmono-opt DECAYING** (last-30 median -3.97% vs all-time +2.93%). Lifetime total still +2.659 SOL with drop_top3=+0.600 — do not kill on decay alone per the fat-tail rule, but edge is softening. Monitor with heightened attention.
- **v23 cohort early signals are mixed.** v23-vwap-climbing (n=2, -0.13 SOL) and v23-vel2050-climbing (n=5, -0.29 SOL, drop_top3=-0.40) are tracking negative out of the gate, but far too early to kill. Recovery strategies (snipers5-recovery, snipers-max-vel) have only 1 trade each.

## Self-Check

Claiming v21-bottom-excluded has real edge: drop_top3=+1.714 SOL confirms edge survives removing its three biggest winners. Monthly run rate of +59 SOL/mo is high because this broad filter accumulates trades quickly (~10+ per day). Panel 11 shows the filter cluster STABLE. Walk-forward for the composite filter is not separately shown in Panel 7, but the component filters (vel<20 OVERFIT as a single filter; top5<10% ROBUST at Panel 7) confirm the combo is doing better than the solo velocity signal alone.

## Operator Next Step

Approve the kill of v21-early-exit-meanrev (both shadow n=141 and paper n=15 variants) — INVALID per all four SOL bar gates at n≥100. This is the most actionable item this cycle.

patterns.detail: All three vel5-10 strategies (v9shadow-vel5-10 -0.884, v14-vel5-10-dd-shadow -1.557, v15-vel5-10-dd-shadow -0.345) are negative despite the vel5-10 single filter having ROBUST walk-forward (0.34pp degradation). Conclusion: TP=10/SL=30 execution costs exceed the signal's edge in the live environment for this velocity band.

v17 BE cohort and v18 Markov DPM cohort both killed between 2026-05-11 and 2026-05-12. Conclusive negative result: calm-survivor entry (sum_abs<60+dd>-10%) at TP=10 cannot accumulate SOL regardless of exit overlay (BE@5/7/9%, Markov P<0.30, trailing stop).

v21-bottom-excluded is the only strategy with n>50, drop_top3>0, and positive total SOL. Running at n=87 toward n=100 in approximately 1-3 more trading days. No lottery-ticket concern: drop_top3=+1.714 SOL.

v10-best-double (+2.875 SOL, n=58), v20-vel2050-dd-base (+1.734 SOL, n=12), and v9shadow-velmono-dev (+4.180 SOL, n=25) all show positive total and positive drop_top3. The vel 20-50 signal family is consistently accumulating. Panel 11 vel20-50+dd>-10% STABLE (wr_std_dev=7.8%).

All four promotion bar gates fail at n>=100. Mean-reversion thesis at TP=10/SL=15/90s is refuted — tokens that cannot reach TP in 90s dominate, producing near-certain SL exits.

n=51, total=-1.557 SOL, drop_top3=-1.936 SOL. All gate values deeply negative with no sign of recovery. Adding dd>-10% protection did not rescue vel5-10's structural loss tail. Pacing toward explicit INVALID at n=100. Recommend killing now rather than waiting — unlikely to recover to positive on 49 more trades from -1.936 SOL drop_top3.

watch.reason: n=87 (shadow), 13 trades from n=100 promotion gate. All four gates positive in lifetime data: total=+3.715 SOL, drop_top3=+1.714 SOL (ROBUST — not lottery-driven), monthly=+59 SOL/mo. Panel 11 vel<20+top5<10% STABLE (wr_std_dev=8.2%). Priority 1 watch this cycle.

n=77, total=-0.884 SOL, drop_top3=-1.468. Pacing toward n=100 as INVALID within ~7 days at current trade rate. Recommend proactive kill after confirmation that recovery is structurally impossible for vel5-10 at TP=10/SL=30.

Watch v21-bottom-excluded (shadow) — n=87, 13 trades from n=100 promotion check. All 4 SOL bar gates clear. Trigger full promotion evaluation when n hits 100: verify Panel 7 combo walk-forward and Panel 11 regime stability.

Watch v9shadow-vel5-10 (n=77, total=-0.884 SOL, drop_top3=-1.468). Will cross n=100 as INVALID within ~7 days unless edge reverses. Prepare kill command for when n>=100 or drop_top3 becomes unrecoverable.
